_comment: Cross-stack parity allowlist — known-acceptable resource count differences between TF and Bicep blueprints. Value = (TF count) - (Bicep count). Positive = TF has more; negative = Bicep has more. Each entry MUST have a justification in docs/lint-baseline.md. The 6 systemic deltas (actionGroups, dataCollectionRules, diagnosticSettings, workbooks, privateEndpoints, privateEndpoints/privateDnsZoneGroups) appear in EVERY standalone blueprint because: (1) TF wires action group, Bicep doesn't unless notifications.deploy=true; (2) TF only ports 1 of 3 FinOps DCRs; (3) Bicep applies diagnostic settings to 5 more resources; (4) Bicep has 2 workbooks (cost+traffic) vs TF 1; (5) TF skips KV PE; (6) TF inlines private_dns_zone_group{} in azurerm_private_endpoint as a sub-block rather than a separate resource.

poc-hub-connected._comment: Hub-connected baseline TBD — TF stack lacks hub plumbing (P9 carryover)

prod-standalone-with-fw._comment: Both stacks defer firewall (deploy-time two-pass); baseline TBD when implemented

stage-b-toggles._comment: All toggles on; baseline TBD — APIM/AppGW/Bastion add many resources
